species: To specifically identify paraspeckle-dependent partners of NONO, we included both wild-type cells and NEAT1-deficient cells in the study.
tissue: two conditions that induce NEAT1 expression and paraspeckle formation in MCF7 cells
disease_state: due to their association with serious human diseases, such as neurodegenerative disorders and cancer.
